meaning: n.鍗婂彜鍏镐綔鍝乤dj.鍗婂彜鍏哥殑
examples: The main formulae of finite temperature semiclassical method are presented for a local potential.
Theory of Stark effect modulation with Doppler broadening is analyzed by the semiclassical theory.
The formula of level shifts in AC Zeeman effect is derived on the base of a simple semiclassical method.
